name: Steamed Ginger Rice with Snow Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice in several changes of water until the water runs clear.
2. Place rice in a 3-quart saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
3. Add water and grated ginger to the rice.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, uncovered.
5. Reduce heat slightly but continue to cook uncovered until surface water disappears and holes appear on the surface of the rice.
6. Cover tightly and turn the heat very low. Cook for 20 minutes.
7. Add snow peas and cover. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and let stand for 3 to 5 minutes before serving.
9. Stir gently to combine rice with snow peas.
